zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Andrews於1437年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓時，他的父親Richard Andrews33歲，母親Catherine Burbeck24歲。他於大約1460年與Joan Margery Clarell在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1496年11月11日在他的家鄉享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Andrews于1437年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Richard Andrews33岁，母亲Catherine Burbeck24岁。他于大约1460年与Joan Margery Clarell在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1496年11月11日在他的家乡享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Andrews was born in 1437, in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Andrews, was 33 and his mother, Catherine Burbeck, was 24. He married Joan Margery Clarell about 1460, in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 11 November 1496, in his hometown, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Andrews est né en 1437, à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Andrews, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Catherine Burbeck, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Margery Clarell environ 1460, à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1496, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Andrews 1437 in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Andrews 33 und seine Mutter Catherine Burbeck 24. Er hat um 1460 in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Margery Clarell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 11. November 1496 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Andrews è nato il nel 1437 nel Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Andrews, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Burbeck, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Margery Clarell circa 1460, nel Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 11 novembre 1496, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Andrewsが1437年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンで生まれた時，父Richard Andrewsは33歳，母Catherine Burbeckは24歳であった。約1460年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンでJoan Margery Clarellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1496年11月11日に故郷で59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Andrews(이)가 1437년 영국 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Andrews(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Burbeck(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에서 Joan Margery Clarell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 11월 11일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Andrews nasceu em 1437, em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Andrews, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Burbeck, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Margery Clarell aproximadamente 1460, em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1496, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Andrews родился в 1437 г. в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Andrews было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Burbeck, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Margery Clarell около 1460 г. в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 11 ноября 1496 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Andrews nació en 1437, en Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Andrews, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Catherine Burbeck, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Margery Clarell aproximadamente 1460, en Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1496, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años.
